scripts.install:frontends: npm run install:client && npm run install:kol
scripts.install:all: npm run install:admin && npm run install:client && npm run install:kol
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,kol -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:kol"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n admin,client,kol -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:kol"
